name: Straightforward Smart Device Installation Help
description: A polite homeowner asks for help installing a newly purchased device and needs clear step-by-step guidance. The scenario tests whether the system can identify an installation issue and provide actionable setup support.
initialMessage: Good afternoon. I just bought your device and I am having trouble getting it installed correctly. Could you please guide me through the setup?
expectedOutcome: The agent provides clear installation troubleshooting steps, confirms the specific installation blocker, and leaves the user with a concrete next action to complete setup.
expectedMilestones: Agent identifies setup stage or blocker
